NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 30, 2014 TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO SERVE THE MOVING PAPERS ON DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL STATES THAT HE HAS NOT BEEN PROVIDED WITH A COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND THEREFORE DEFENDANT HAS NOT HAD AN OPPORTUNITY TO MEANINGFULLY RESPOND. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE THE MOVING PAPERS ON DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL BY SEPTEMBER 8, 2014 OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. DEFENDANT MAY FILE AN OPPOSITION AND PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A REPLY IN ACCORDANCE WITH CCP SEC. 1005 CONTEMPLATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED

ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO AMEND THE JUDGMENT

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF GELASIO ORTEGA'S MOTION TO AMEND THE JUDGMENT TO ADD NON PARTY ALTER EGO, GORDON TAMMS, AS JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE PLAINTIFF FAILS TO MAINTAIN HER EVIDENTIARY BURDEN. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE (THE DECLARATION OF COUNSEL) FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE ALTER EGO LIABILITY OR THAT MR. TAMM CONTROLLED THE UNDERLYING LITIGATION. THE COURT SUSTAINS MR. TAMM'S OBJECTION TO THAT DECLARATION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: PAULA SHI, CSR # 13358 (302)
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 15112049): KAUFMAN, JEFFREY S. SUBSTITUTED FOR KAUFMAN, JEFFREY S. AS ATTORNEY FOR TAMM, GORDON

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Gordon Tamms As Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEFFREY S. KAUFMAN OF THE NEWMEYER & DILLON LLP, TEL. NO. (949) 271-7231 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT GORDON TAMM BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GELASIO ORTEGA's Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Gordon Tamms, As Judgment Debtor is denied without prejudice. The plaintiff fails to maintain her evidentiary burden. Plaintiff's evidence (the declaration of counsel) fails to demonstrate alter ego liability or that Mr. Tamm controlled the underlying litigation. The court sustains Mr. Tamm's objection to that declaration. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Paula Shi, CSR # 13358 =302/eg

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Gordon Tamms As Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Aug-28-2014 Continued To Sep-30-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF GELASIO ORTEGA's Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Gordon Tamms As Judgment Debtor is continued to September 30, 2014 to allow Plaintiff to serve the moving papers on Defendant's counsel. Defendant's counsel states that he has not been provided with a copy of the moving papers and therefore Defendant has not had an opportunity to meaningfully respond. Plaintiff shall serve the moving papers on Defendant's counsel by September 8, 2014 or the motion will be denied. Defendant may file an opposition and Plaintiff may file a reply in accordance with CCP sec. 1005 contemplating the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ehg

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Gordon Tamms As Judgment Debtor

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., 510.985.9250, specially appearing for plaintiff Gelasio Ortega.
Jeffrey Kaufman, Esq., 949.271.7231, for defendant Gordon Tamms.

RULING: Argued and the Court vacated its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF GELASIO ORTEGA'S Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Gordon Tamms, As Judgment Debtor is continued for hearing to August 28, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
